title: bothriochloa bladhii subsp. glabra
intro: Bothriochloa bladhii subsp. glabra, also known as smooth blady grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Bothriochloa bladhii subsp. glabra include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Bothriochloa bladhii subsp. glabra include teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
